text: polos 'eved elohim ushelicha yeshu'a hamashicha lefi emunat bechirey elohim veda'at haemet asher lachasidut
'aley-tiqevat chayey 'olam asher lifeney yemot 'olam hiveticha hael asher lo yekhazev
vegila et-devaro bemo'ado 'al-yedey haqeria hamufeqada beyadi bemitsevat haelohim moshi'enu
el-titos beni haamiti beemuna echat chesed verachamim veshalom meet haelohim avinu vaadoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha moshi'enu
ba'avur zot hinachetikha viqereyti ba'avur asher tashelim et-hechaser utemane zeqenim bekhal-'ir va'ir kaasher tsivitikha
im-yimatse ish tam uva'al-isha echat veyesh-lo banim maaminim veeyn 'aleyhem ta'anat peritsut veeynam sorarim
ki-hegemon ha'eda tsarikh liheyot ish tam kesokhen lelohim lo 'omed 'al-da'eto velo ragezan velo ohev yayin velo-va'al egerof velo votse'a betsa' ra'
ki im-yehi makhenis orechim veohev tov vetsanu'a vetsadiq veqadosh vekhovesh et-yitsero
umachaziq badavar haneeman kefi hahoraa lema'an yiheyeh-bo khocha lehazehir baleqach habari ulehokhicha et-hamerivim
ki-yesh harebe moredim doverey hevel umate'ey nafesh verubam min-hanimolim
asher sakhor yisakher pihem hahofekhim batim kulam behorotam devarim asher lo-khen 'eqev batsa'
ukhevar amar echad mehem neviam miqirebam beney qereyti meshaqerim me'olam vechayot ra'ot hema vegam keresim 'atselim
veha'edut hazot emet uva'avur-ken tokhichem tokhecha qasha lema'an yiheyu veriim baemuna
velo yasimu lev el-hagadot hayehudim veel-mitseot haanashim hasarim min-haemet
hakol tahor latehorim aval lanitemeim ulechaserey emuna eyn-davar tahor ki nitemea da'etam verucham
omerim hema yada'enu et-haelohim uvema'aseyhem koferim bo ki meto'avim umamerim hem velo-yitselechu lekhal-ma'ase tov
veata daber et-hanae laleqach habari
hazeqenim yiheyu mshelim berucham umekhubadim utsenu'im uveriim baemuna uvaahava uvasavelanut
vekhen hazeqenot tehi darekan kaasher naava laqodesh lo tiheyeyna motsiot diba ra'a velo netunot lisevo-yayin ki im-melamedot tov
umeyasherot et-hatse'irot leehov et-ba'aleyhen veleehov et-beneyhen
veliheyot tsenu'ot utehorot tsofiot halikhot beytan vetovot venikhena'ot lifeney va'aleyhen lema'an asher lo-yechulal devar haelohim
kakha tazehir gam et-habachurim sheyiheyu tsenu'im
uvekhal-davar heye ata lemofet bema'asim tovim behoraa tserufa venehedara
uvedavar bari sheeyn-bo mum lema'an yevosh hamiteqomem velo yimetsa ledaber 'aleykhem ra'
ha'avadim yikane'u laadoneyhem veyiteratsu lahem lekhal-davar velo yameru et-divereyhem
velo-yime'alu ma'al ki im-yareu kal-emuna tova lema'an yefaaru vakol et-leqach elohim moshi'enu
ki hofi'a chesed elohim lehoshi'a et-kal-beney haadam
ulehaderikh otanu lema'an neta'ev haresha' vetaaot ha'olam venitehalekh ba'olam haze bitseni'ut uvetsedeq uvachasidut
unechake latiqeva hameasheret ulehofa'at kevod eloheynu hagadol umoshi'enu yeshu'a hamashicha
asher-natan et-nafesho ba'adenu lifedot otanu mikal-'avel uletaher lo 'am segula hazariz bema'asim tovim
ele tedaber vetazehir vetokhicha bechazeqa veish al-yavuz lakh
hazeker otam sheyiheyu nikhena'im veshome'im lasarim velashiletonim unekhonim lekhal-ma'ase tov
ulevileti daber ra' 'al kal-adam velachadol meriv veladin lekhaf zekhut ulehitenaheg ba'anava lifeney kal-adam
ki gam-anachenu hayinu milefanim chaserey da'at vesorarim veto'im va'avadim letaaot veliteshuqot shonot umitehalekhim berishe'a veqinea usenuim vesneim ish et-achiv
amenam kaasher nigela no'am elohim moshi'enu veahavato et-haadam
lo vigelal ma'asey hatsedaqa asher 'asinu hoshi'a otanu ki im-bechasedo 'al-yedey tevilat halida hachadasha vechidush rucha haqodesh
asher shafakh 'aleynu lemakhebir 'al-yedey yeshu'a hamashicha moshi'enu
lema'an nitsedaq bechasedo venirash lefi hatiqeva et-chayey ha'olamim
emet hadavar verotse ani sheteqayem et-ele lema'an asher yisheqedu hamaaminim belohim la'asoq bema'asim tovim ki tov la'asot kaele umo'il laadam
aval tirechaq min-hasheelot hatefelot umilimudey toladot umimedanim verivot bidevar hachuqim ki-eyn bahen mo'il vehevel hena
veish hacholeq 'al-haemuna im-hukhach pa'am ushetayim sete me'alayv
veda' ki-ish kaze hafakhepakh hu vechote kemareshi'a et-nafesho
beshalechi eleykha et-aretemas o et-tukhiqos temaher lavo elay leniqapolis ki-gamareti velibi lashevet sham bimey hasetayv
sheqod leshalecha et-zeynas ba'al hatora veet-apolos lema'an lo-yacheseru davar ledarekam
veyilemedu gam-aneshey 'adatenu la'asoq bema'asim tovim la'azor bekhal-machesor pen-yiheyu beli-feri
kol asher 'imadi shoalim lishelomekha sheal lishelom haohavim otanu beemuna hachesed 'im-kulekhem amen ﻿
